review_title: It really is the most user friendly CRM that you can imagine.
description: Insight and overview in all processes, pre-sales and after-sales. Better and more personal communication with prospects and customers.
author: Marcel S.
pros: User interface is great. Very easy to use and administer. Users can work with the CRM functions within a few hours. Integration with Office applications and Office 365 is more than perfect. You can use Outlook like you always did and still your emails are stored in CRM linked to the right customer and project. I love the fact that you never really have to search for anything. All parts of the application are never more than two clicks away.
cons: Only one thing that bothers me using SuperOffice: the standard reports are very basic. We use the dashboards a lot -they are great- and there are some Apps in their own app store that allow us to generate the reports we need.

review_title: The Competitive Approach
description: SuperOffice CRM is the professional relations managing approach
author: Jessica M.
pros: SuperOffice CRM has the interests of all the clients
cons: SuperOffice CRM is determined without mistakes

review_title: Not good - many necessary features not available
description: The overall experience for me is that I would never choose SuperOffice again but rather the solution Microsoft offers. It is more expensive, but trust me, it is worth it!
author: Lukas D.
pros: The best thing about the CRM is that it is very easy to use and has a very easy to follow structure (Firm/People and Sale/Projekt).
cons: Many basic features which one thinks every CRM provide are not available. The most critical problem is that selections are extremely limited. For example, one cannot make a selection of all "Projekt leaders", which would be critical for us in order to send all of our customers who are Project leaders a standardised e-mail. Many further issues arise there once you have spent some time testing the selections (many limitations became apparent only after using the CRM, not during the evaluation process). A further issue are the many bugs which the system has, for example the data-export does not work properly even though issues have been posted on the community platform for 5 years!

review_title: You can almost say it 'runs the company'!
description: We run the business on SuperOffice, dealing with customer communications (incoming and outgoing) and sales pipeline management, but most importantly the event management using the projects area.
author: Matt C.
pros: I like the fact that we can out every process in to the CRM, from sales to event management, data capture and enquiry management.
cons: The Community needs a bit of work adding more complex resources in, but as a starter guide is useful and support do assist.

review_title: Stellar CRM
description: SuperOffice has been a great hub for collecting, organizing and making sense of valuable contact data and insights, whilst providing all the features and tools needed to manage information about people, projects, relations and other aspects that are important to our line of business.
author: Eva Y.
pros: It is reliable, easy to implement and use and optimizes all our contacts, relationships, projects, tasks etc.
cons: Perhaps the marketing module should be included in the base package.

review_title: Innovative CRM but needs significant improvement
description: Currently we have stopped using it due to certain bugs in this product, hopefully they have sorted it out.
author: Devesh V.
pros: It was simplified and easy to use, conference call feature is pretty useful too.
cons: Cross connection in calls, balance gets deducted after every call, owing to call forwarding, which is not the case with other crms.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get customer requests sorted and never loose a request.
description: Customer support works much better.
author: Günther L.
pros: Quite easy to handle. Easy to edit cases and the connection to customer relations. All necessary information is visible.
cons: None automatic update in the browser of the CsTags as the program is web based. Configuration of the user not that easy.

review_title: Easy to use and excellent support
author: Pär G.
pros: Easy to use and learn. Very effective use of the computer screen area with no or very little scrolling. The integration with MSOffice makes SO very effective.
cons: Built-in, easy to access version history.

review_title: review Super office
description: our CRM is in there, we work with projects
author: Magriet V.
pros: functionality, ease of use. great to have an online version also for the people on the road.
cons: it takes a while before you understand working in SO as an admin.

review_title: Userfriendly CRM
description: We had a lot of seperate lists at our office. it was a lot of work to adjust all of the listst, now, with SuperOffice, we only have to do it once. Another Pro is that we, as marketing, are not the only one who is responsible for all the adjustments. Sales can do it to and we always have an up to date overview.
author: Sabrina M.
pros: It is really easy to use. A lot of information can be found on internet. A lot of possibilities (customizable). Pirce (if you use the standard version.
cons: customizable, but expensive and as marketeer I have to say that the marketing tool is limited

review_title: Simple to use and good integration options
description: All in all, we are very satisfied with the solution. It has very good API connection options that are also very well documented. The many extensions via apps enable easy integration of other systems.
author: Georg D.
pros: The user interface is clear and very intuitive to use. This enables a very short onboarding of new users. Screens can be customized very easily.
cons: Support is good but sometimes we would like to have shorter communication. Sometimes it takes a little longer until BUGs are fixed.

review_title: CRM for different business realities
description: On average, the experience we had with Superoffice is positive. it allowed colleagues to work more as a team by sharing the information entered in the CRM for the good of the company.
author: PAOLO P.
pros: Superoffice has been the reference point for us as CRM for at least a couple of years. Its ease of use and integration with the e-mail client has allowed the sales department to perform various activities on customers thanks to the information collected and available in an optimal way. It is the first CRM that allowed us to integrate the data of our management program.
cons: In some cases the integration with the mail did not work correctly, this is one of the aspects that led us to evaluate other CRMs.

review_title: An easy to use CRM with many functions!
description: Could not do without it today. Used daily and often in the phone.
author: Simon W.
pros: The selection tab is my favourite. Filter almost anything once you get your head around it. % before searchword is also a good way to find companies in your crm. It also syncs well with our NAV invoicing program so I can see sales month to month easy.
cons: If you don´t know the company name it takes a bit longer to find out, say if you know where they are situated but haven´t got the name. The pocket version is a bit limited and could be better.

review_title: A few clicks a day makes your work saved and safe!
description: The evaluation work, how profitable a project becomes from sales to completion is easy to monitor. Also involving project mempers and provide them with relevant information is easily done.
author: Ramin R.
pros: Easy to find a specific e-mail correspondence without spending hours of search. When travelling abroad, you can reach the information needed easily over the internet.
cons: Maybe the connectivity to the server while travelling abroad, but I suppose that is not something Super Office could do much about.

review_title: SuperOffice is a joy to work with
description: When SuperOffice is working it is absolutely amazing and really helps to optimise your work. But when SO is down, it is stressful because you can't access the information you need to do the job.
author: Liesbeth W.
pros: It is easy to use. You can find information fast. It is a pleasure to work with.
cons: SuperOffice has had some issues lately. You can't access the website for a while. Therefore you can't work as efficiently as you would like.

review_title: Easy to adapt to your needs
description: SuperOffice is a tool you can use for so many different things, leads, orders, correspondence, e-mail send-outs, Sales.. and since I am am big fan of efficiency , this is what I like most, SuperOffice makes it easy to be efficent!
author: Hanna G.
pros: Easy to use, easy to adapt to your own needs and set up for your type of business.
cons: Hard to say, maybe that the settings for import could be a bit more advanced.

review_title: We have previously used the server based system and the on line version for the past 3 years
description: Improved our relationships with our clients and suppliers Great user experience
author: Nick W.
pros: Clean and intuitive user interface, I do prefer the online version though as it's always up to date and saves time and cost of having the version updates applied and it has a reliable and easy to use mobile app, which I find really useful.
cons: Like most CRM systems, you need to put the time in to customize the system and get to know it, which obviously takes time, but I have to say it's time well spent.

review_title: Great Tool to increase your sales and make your life easier
description: Superofficehelp us to keep track on ongoing projects and also make it easy to send out new information to our Customers
author: Johnny O.
pros: The User Friendly setup, it is easy to understand and you can start work and take advantage of it from day 1. In combination with the App for your mobile it is a great tool. Additional to these these featurs the actual contactnamn and their telephone number will automatically be transfered to your conatctlist in your mobile.
cons: Thy way to sava end find documents can be approved

review_title: Daily user
description: My overall experiance is fine i work with it daily and it all go's smoothly
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It has a sleek and proffesional look and it works smoothly.
cons: The ticket system could be faster then it is at the moment

review_title: Superoffice
description: Generally it is a super system. I have been working with super office for more than 5 years. It is very user-friendly and the support department is always ready to help you
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is a very clear and user-friendly system.
cons: you can't change the system to personalize the icons

review_title: Great system to keep all business data in one place.
description: All commercial business data in one place. An internationally unified Customer Servcie experience.
author: Marcel V.
pros: Combination of CRM and Customer Service ticketing. The flexibility of adapting it to your own liking. The posibility of using it also on mobile devices.
cons: Not easy to change things yourself; most of the time you need the help of a SuperOffice employee. No automatic updates when you're not in the cloud; takes time and money.

review_title: SuperOffice is the backbone of our company.
description: SuperOffice has a lot of experience with implementations, so they are really good in helping new customers to build up the application in your company.
author: Robbert V.
pros: SuperOffice gives you an easy to use CRM application were you can store al your contact with customers, clients and suppliers.
cons: I took some time to persuade everyone in our company to use SuperOffice all the time. Good change management is required.

review_title: My review
description: I'm glad we finally got this software. I've begging for it in nine years :-). My experience so far is good. But as I said, I need to learn more.
author: Peter A.
pros: Since it's still new for me I haven't discovered evething I can use (I think). It's good to collect e-mail, meetings and events to a project/customer.
cons: I still don't be master of how to handle ToDo's. I'm looking forward to learn more about that but it's also a matter of time for me to learn more. I want to set up small ToDo's without create it on the calender.

review_title: Complete and powerful system to support all main processes
description: Better overview and storage of all activities and customer information
author: Jan H.
pros: Very flexible in setup. Very fast and good helpdesk. It's quite easy to build any process in Super office. It's easy to keep track of all relevant information about customers, suppliers and staff.
cons: Sometimes it's still difficult to retain a certain mail or document. when you open an item from a "selection", you can't go back to his selection but you need to reopen it every time. Would be nice to open items in a selection in a new window.

review_title: SuperOffice; the one and only!
description: A very positive experience, especially extra credits for the support team; quick, talented and friendly!
author: Iris G.
pros: The several (personalized and combined) selections
cons: The app functionality; it isn't available on your mobile phone. We would like to use the app functionality for our foreign customers, so also accessible after 5 / 6 pm and in the weekends.
